Nexus Card Executive Briefing Request Briefing

Every engagement begins
with a question.

"Is your organization ready to examine the structure?" All engagements begin with a vetting briefing because transformation requires readiness. Not just interest.

Request Executive Briefing →
Keynote

Signature Keynote

Proposal-based

60–90 min

A high-impact keynote designed to shift how leadership teams think about burnout, structure, and human sustainability. Fully customized to your event context and organizational moment.

  • → Pre-event discovery call
  • → Custom talk arc aligned to conference theme
  • → Post-keynote digital resource for attendees
  • → Travel & hospitality requirements apply (see below)
Request Executive Briefing
Tier 01

Keynote + Workshop Bundle

Proposal-based

Keynote + Half-Day Workshop

Pairs the keynote with an immersive half-day workshop for leadership teams. Participants leave with a structural diagnostic framework they can apply immediately.

  • → Full keynote delivery
  • → Half-day interactive workshop (up to 40 leaders)
  • → Custom facilitation guide
  • → Post-workshop integration notes
  • → Travel & hospitality requirements apply
Request Executive Briefing
Most Requested
Tier 02

UNMASK Diagnostic Architecture

Proposal-based

4–6 Weeks

A deep organizational diagnostic using the UNMASK Framework. Surfaces the structural conditions producing burnout, attrition, and silenced capacity, across teams, systems, and leadership layers.

  • → Organizational intake and structural mapping
  • → UNMASK pillar assessment across 3–5 key teams
  • → Leadership interview protocol
  • → Full Diagnostic Report with Findings & Recommendations
  • → Executive Debrief session
  • → 90-day monitoring check-in
Request Diagnostic Briefing
Tier 03

UNMASK Recalibration Engagement

Contact for Scope

90 Days

The full recalibration experience. Moves from diagnosis through structural redesign and implementation support, with embedded accountability systems built to outlast the engagement.

  • → Full Diagnostic Architecture (Tier 02)
  • → Structural redesign sessions with leadership team
  • → Department-level recalibration workshops
  • → Implementation roadmap with accountability checkpoints
  • → Monthly cohort debriefs (3)
  • → Custom UNMASK organizational playbook
  • → 6-month post-engagement check-in
Request Recalibration Briefing
Tier 04

Stabilization Retainer

Contact for Scope

Ongoing (3-month minimum)

For organizations that need ongoing strategic counsel and accountability as they implement structural changes. Monthly advisory access, monitoring, and course correction.

  • → 2 strategic advisory sessions per month
  • → Async communication channel access
  • → Monthly structural health review
  • → Course-correction support
  • → Priority access for urgent escalations
Apply for Retainer
AI Audit

AI Acceleration Burnout Audit

Proposal-based

4–6 Weeks

A specialized diagnostic for organizations deploying AI tools at scale. Identifies how automation is disrupting human systems, amplifying structural strain, or breaking the bridge between people and mission.

  • → AI deployment impact assessment
  • → Human architecture vulnerability mapping
  • → Leadership readiness review for AI-era shifts
  • → Full Audit Report with Risk Matrix
  • → Strategic mitigation recommendations
Request AI Audit Briefing
Enterprise

Custom Enterprise Engagements

For organizations requiring multi-department implementation, enterprise licensing of the UNMASK system, or long-term embedded partnership, proposal-based scope is available. All custom engagements require an Executive Briefing before scoping.

Begin the Briefing Process →
2026 Signature Talks

The Five Talks That Move Rooms

01

"Stop the Strain Transfer"

How organizations unconsciously redistribute unresolved structural pain, and what to do instead.

02

"Your Leadership Pipeline Is Leaking"

Why your pipeline programs keep producing burned-out leaders, and the structural fix your org won't like.

03

"False Urgency: How "Everything Is Critical" Is Destroying Your Organization"

The urgent-everything culture is a structural symptom, not a leadership style.

04

"Sovereign Power: Leading Without Running on Empty"

What it looks like when leaders reclaim structural sovereignty, and how to build it organizationally.

05

"When AI Breaks the Bridge: Protecting Human Architecture in the Age of Automation"

The AI conversation no one is having: how automation is amplifying structural burnout, not solving it.

Schedule a Speaking Conversation

Ready to bring one of these talks to your event?

Speaking inquiries begin with an Executive Briefing so the scope, audience, and outcomes can be aligned before booking.

Request Executive Briefing →

Speaking and workshop scope available after Executive Briefing

Booking Terms

✓ 50% deposit at signing ✓ Balance due 7 days prior ✓ 10% reduction for virtual engagements ✓ Signed agreement required for all engagements
